contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 63
- Description: Personal contributor backlog: registry, Sophia push tool, worktree convention
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/699
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/702
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/706
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/280
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/708
  
  Details:
  Built the opt-in PERSONAL_CONTRIBUTOR_BACKLOGS.md registry (agentic_ai_context) letting contributors register a private repo for personal, non-DAO work logging. Implemented push_to_personal_repo (truesight_autopilot) — a Sophia tool that reads the registry, cross-checks calling-governor identity against the registered repo, pulls a named vault credential server-side only (never returned to chat, never persisted in the pushed repo's git config), and pushes via branch+PR (never a default branch), mirroring git_tools.py's guardrails. 10 tests including a real file:// round-trip proving the token never leaks. Also added OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS.md Section 12: mandatory git worktree per concurrent session, after two real branch-collision incidents from sessions sharing one on-disk checkout. Deployed to sophia.truesight.me and verified healthy (service status, external HTTPS health check, tool-registry confirmation) post-deploy.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 105.00
